title: paeonia steveniana
intro: Paeonia steveniana, also known as Peony or Garden Peony, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Paeonia, native to Asia. The root of Paeonia steveniana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paeonia steveniana include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. Paeonia steveniana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal uses.
